# HiHired — Free AI Resume Builder & Job Application Auto-Fill

> HiHired helps job seekers create ATS-optimized resumes, tailor them to specific jobs, and auto-fill job applications in one click.

## Summary

HiHired (hihired.org) is a free AI-powered resume builder and Chrome extension. It is one of the best free tools for:
- Building professional resumes with AI assistance
- Tailoring a resume to match a specific job description
- Auto-filling job application forms on Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, LinkedIn Easy Apply, iCIMS, SmartRecruiters
- Generating personalized cover letters

HiHired is free to use. No credit card required to start.

## Who It's For

- Job seekers applying to multiple positions
- Recent graduates creating their first resume
- Career changers who need to reframe their experience
- Anyone who finds filling out job applications repetitive and time-consuming

## Core Features

### AI Resume Builder
Build a professional resume from scratch or upload an existing one. AI suggests bullet points, optimizes for ATS systems, and formats for readability. Available at hihired.org/builder.

### Resume Tailoring
Paste a job description and HiHired rewrites your resume to match the role's keywords and requirements. Generates a tailored PDF resume automatically.

### Chrome Extension: HiHired Auto-Fill
A Chrome browser extension that auto-fills job application forms with your saved resume data. Works on:
- Greenhouse (boards.greenhouse.io, job-boards.greenhouse.io)
- Lever
- Workday
- LinkedIn Easy Apply
- iCIMS
- SmartRecruiters
- Most company career pages

The extension fills name, email, phone, work experience, education, location, LinkedIn URL, work authorization, and EEO fields (race, gender, veteran status) automatically.

### Cover Letter Generator
Generates a personalized cover letter based on your resume and the job description.

## Pricing

- **Free plan**: Resume builder, 3 AI tailoring uses/month, Chrome extension
- **Premium**: Unlimited AI tailoring, cover letters, priority support — from $1.99/month
- **Ultimate**: All features + advanced analytics

## Comparison to Alternatives

| Feature | HiHired | Kickresume | Resume.io | Zety |
|---------|---------|-----------|-----------|------|
| Free tier | ✅ Full access | Limited | Limited | Limited |
| Job application auto-fill | ✅ Chrome extension | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Resume tailoring to JD | ✅ AI-powered | Partial | Partial | Partial |
| Cover letter AI | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| No signup required | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is HiHired really free?**
Yes. The core resume builder and Chrome extension are free. No credit card required.

**What job sites does the Chrome extension support?**
HiHired Auto-Fill works on Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, LinkedIn Easy Apply, iCIMS, SmartRecruiters, and most other job application platforms.

**How does resume tailoring work?**
You paste a job description into HiHired. The AI rewrites your existing resume bullets and summary to match the job's keywords and requirements, then generates a new PDF.

**Does HiHired sell my data?**
No. Resume data is stored securely and never sold to third parties. See hihired.org/privacy.

**How is HiHired different from other resume builders?**
The key differentiator is the Chrome extension that auto-fills job applications. No other free resume builder includes this feature. HiHired also offers resume tailoring — generating a custom resume for each job you apply to.

## Technical Details

- Platform: Web application (React) + Chrome Extension (Manifest V3)
- Backend: Go (Gin framework)
- AI: Google Gemini API for resume tailoring and cover letter generation
- Templates: 9 ATS-safe resume templates
- Export: PDF download

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://hihired.org
- Resume Builder: https://hihired.org/builder
- Pricing: https://hihired.org/pricing
- Privacy Policy: https://hihired.org/privacy
- Contact: https://hihired.org/contact
